elements.sent-2411-003: Gaussian multiplicative chaos (GMC), introduced by Kahane in the 1980s \cite{Kah85a , is a theory of random measures.}
elements.sent-2411-004: Informally, GMC measures are the exponential of log-correlated Gaussian fields.
elements.sent-2411-005: GMC measures play an essential role in fields like mathematical physics, Liouville quantum gravity, and multifractal analysis.
elements.sent-2411-006: Because of their foundational significance, the harmonic analytic properties of GMC measures, such as whether they can be classified as Salem measures, have attracted considerable attention.
elements.sent-2411-007: Recently, the harmonic analysis, the Fourier decay and the Fourier dimension of GMC has gained considerable attention.

elements.sent-2411-141: For any integers $k\geq2$ and $1\le h\le 2^{k-1}$, using the elementary inequality \begin{equation}\label{xy-small} (x+y)^{p/q} \le x^{p/q} + y^{p/q} \quad for any $x, y\ge 0$ (since $0<p/q<1$),\end{equation} we have \begin{equation}\label{decomposion-EZ}  E[\left\|Z_{k,h}\right\|_{\ell^q}^p] =E\Big[\Big\{ \sum_{n=1}^{\infty}|Z_{k,h}(n)|^{q}\Big\}^{p/q}\Big] \le \underbrace{E\Big[\Big\{\sum_{n=1}^{2^k}|Z_{k,h}(n)|^{q}\Big\}^{p/q}\Big]}_{denoted $Q_1(k,h)$}+\underbrace{E\Big[\Big\{\sum_{n=2^k+1}^{\infty}|Z_{k,h}(n)|^{q}\Big\}^{p/q}\Big]}_{denoted $Q_2(k,h)$}. \end{equation} Since \begin{equation}|Z_{k,h}(n)|=\Big|n^{\frac{\tau}{2}}\int_{\frac{h-1}{2^{k-1}}}^{\frac{h}{2^{k-1}}}\Big[\prod_{j=0}^{k}X_j(t)\Big]e^{-2\pi int}dt\Big|\leq n^{\frac{\tau}{2}}\int_{\frac{h-1}{2^{k-1}}}^{\frac{h}{2^{k-1}}}\Big[\prod_{j=0}^{k}X_j(t)\Big]dt,\end{equation} we have \begin{equation}\label{decomposion-Z1}  Q_1(k,h) \leqE\Big[\Big\{\sum_{n=1}^{2^k}n^{\frac{\tau q}{2}}\Big(\int_{\frac{h-1}{2^{k-1}}}^{\frac{h}{2^{k-1}}}\Big[\prod_{j=0}^{k}X_j(t)\Big]dt\Big)^{q}\Big\}^{p/q}\Big] =\Big(\sum_{n=1}^{2^k}n^{\frac{\tau q}{2}}\Big)^{\frac{p}{q}}E\Big[\Big(\int_{\frac{h-1}{2^{k-1}}}^{\frac{h}{2^{k-1}}}\Big[\prod_{j=0}^{k}X_j(t)\Big]dt\Big)^{p}\Big] \lesssim \underbrace{2^{k(\frac{\tau p}{2}+\frac{p}{q})}E\Big[\Big(\int_{\frac{h-1}{2^{k-1}}}^{\frac{h}{2^{k-1}}}\Big[\prod_{j=0}^{k}X_j(t)\Big]dt\Big)^{p}\Big]}_{\text{denoted $Q_{11}(k,h)$}}. \end{equation} For the second term $Q_2(k,h)$, by considering the summation \begin{equation}\sum_{n=2^k+1}^{\infty}=\sum_{L=1}^{\infty}\sum_{n=2^{k+L-1}+1}^{2^{k+L}},\end{equation} we obtain \begin{equation}Q_2(k,h)=E\Big[\Big\{\sum_{L=1}^{\infty}\sum_{n=2^{k+L-1}+1}^{2^{k+L}}|Z_{k,h}(n)|^{q}\Big\}^{p/q}\Big].\end{equation}.

elements.sent-2411-227: In this paper, we establish the exact Fourier dimension for all standard sub-critical Gaussian multiplicative chaos on the unit interval, thereby confirming the Garban-Vargas conjecture.

elements.sent-2411-535: In this paper, we establish the exact Fourier dimensions of all standard sub-critical Gaussian multiplicative chaos on the unit interval, thereby confirming the Garban-Vargas conjecture.
elements.sent-2411-536: This paper is the first part of a series of works on the harmonic analysis of multiplicative chaos measures in the Euclidean spaces.
